properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v3 v5 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've come here To find You Arms open wide I'm empty But Your fountain Never runs dry

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So fall down on me Pour Your presence out

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I raise my hands Shout out loud Hope is rising all around Cause You are here You are here Holy Spirit capture me Open heaven let me see That You are here Jesus You are here

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm ready To listen Speak to my heart Come show me Your fullness How great You are

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And I join all creation (You are here) Singing praise to the King of kings, yeah As I bow and surrender (You are here) Offering everything
